$comment: Vercel does not support a monorepo with experimentalServices. The frontend (Vite) and backend (Express) should be deployed as two separate Vercel projects pointing at frontend/ and backend/ respectively, or both run on a single Node host (Render, Railway, Fly.io). If you must deploy on Vercel, the backend should be exposed as a Vercel Function from backend/src/app.js (see backend/api/index.js for the serverless wrapper).
